goal: Execute phase-0 kickoff from metaverse plan by delivering Core Data Dictionary v1 and API Contract Draft v1 for identity, cloud save, social lobby, world event, and economy modules.
constraints: Preserve existing gameplay and story runtime baseline; this task is documentation and contract design only.
Keep backward compatibility strategy explicit for existing /api/v1 routes.
Make ownership and implementation priority clear for Codex, Antigravity, and Trae.
deliverables: Metaverse core data dictionary v1 document with entity schemas and relationships.
Metaverse API contract draft v1 with endpoint matrix, request/response contracts, and error code policy.
Migration and rollout notes that minimize codebase churn.
